text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
choice_data_list: There's no need to beat yourself up!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Just 'cause I lost this time doesn't mean I'll
stay down forever!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'll win the next one and treat my little sister back
home to a mountain of delicious white rice!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But just rice won't cut it! I'll give her some yummy
pickled daikon radish for a side as well!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer! Time to get me a boatload of
daikon radishes so I can pickle 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We go to the shopping district, buy some daikon
radishes and yellowtail, and make a nice meal.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: That might be true, but still!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
My little sis is still waiting for me back in my
hometown! I can't go back empty-handed!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I know! I'll catch a kappa for her as a
souvenir!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You know what that means, Trainer! We gotta get
some cucumbers for bait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship and I head to the shopping district,
buy ten cucumbers, and then eat them—lightly
salted.
